Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui

Class NonprofitBookkeepingFX.ServiceContainer

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.NonprofitBookkeepingFX.ServiceContainer
Enclosing class:
NonprofitBookkeepingFX
private static final class NonprofitBookkeepingFX.ServiceContainer extends Object
Static inner class acting as a container for singleton service instances. This provides a central point of access for various services used throughout the application.
